violations.summary: DG-SCHEMA: a doc promises a doc-gardner schema gate some code executes, but no shipped .py references doc-gardner-schema.json (matching .py files: 0)

KAIZEN-USERREPO: the kaizen how-to promises config validation for user repos, but no hook/skill invokes config validation with a consumer-repo root (validate_plugin.py hard-anchors ROOT to the karta repo) (matching .py files: 0)
